name: Ryobi 40V 12" Wheeled Snow Shovel Kit
description: A powered wheeled snow shovel for light snowfall on walkways, patios, and small driveways. More powerful than a manual shovel but lighter and more compact than a full snow blower. Perfect for areas that get occasional light snow.
features: Powered auger throws snow to the side

name: Ryobi 40V 15" Attachment Capable String Trimmer Kit
description: The entry-level 40V string trimmer with a 15-inch cutting width and attachment capability. Includes battery and charger to get you started in the 40V ecosystem. Good for medium-sized yards with moderate weed growth.

name: Ryobi 40V 18" Pole Hedge Trimmer Kit
description: A pole hedge trimmer for reaching tall hedges without a ladder. The extended pole puts the trimmer head up to 9 feet off the ground. The articulating head pivots to trim the tops of hedges at the correct angle. Safer and more efficient than climbing a ladder with a hedge trimmer.
features: Extended reach for tall hedges -- no ladder needed
Articulating head pivots for top trimming

name: Ryobi 40V 24" Hedge Trimmer (Tool Only)
description: A 40V 24-inch hedge trimmer for maintaining large hedges and thick shrubs. The 40V battery provides more power than 18V models for cutting through thicker branches. The 24-inch blade covers more hedge per pass.

name: Ryobi 40V 550 CFM Blower (Tool Only)
description: The entry-level 40V blower at 550 CFM provides more power than any 18V model at an affordable price. A solid choice for medium to large yards where 18V blowers run out of steam. No brushless motor keeps the price down.

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 15" Carbon Fiber Attachment-Capable String Trimmer Kit (4.0Ah)
description: Ryobi's premium string trimmer uses a carbon fiber shaft for durability without extra weight. Like Milwaukee, it supports attachments -- Ryobi's EXPAND-IT system lets you add an edger, pole saw, blower, and more. The adjustable 13-15 inch cutting swath lets you trade width for extended battery life when you need it.
features: EXPAND-IT attachment compatible for edger, blower, pole saw, and more
Carbon fiber shaft for lightweight durability
REEL EASY+ 3-in-1 bump feed head reloads in 60 seconds
Adjustable 13-15 inch cutting swath for runtime vs. productivity
40V rapid charger included for 4X faster charging

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 16" Chainsaw (Tool Only)
description: A 16-inch cordless chainsaw with serious cutting capability. Handles trees up to 14 inches in diameter. The 40V HP brushless motor provides the sustained power needed for felling medium trees, cutting firewood, and storm cleanup. A genuine gas chainsaw replacement for most homeowners.
features: HP Brushless motor for sustained cutting power

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 17" Attachment Capable String Trimmer (Tool Only)
description: The 40V HP brushless 17-inch string trimmer is attachment capable, meaning you can swap the trimmer head for an edger, pole saw, blower, or cultivator attachment. One powerhead, multiple tools. The 40V battery delivers more power than any 18V trimmer for thick weeds and heavy grass.
features: HP Brushless motor for thick vegetation

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 18" Chainsaw Kit (5.0Ah)
description: Ryobi's 18-inch chainsaw delivers more power than a 40cc gas saw at a price that's hard to beat. At 168 cuts per charge on 4x4 lumber, it has solid endurance for weekend firewood or storm cleanup. It handles softwoods with ease and can power through seasoned hardwood rounds, though it's happiest on trunks up to about 14-16 inches. Shares batteries with the entire Ryobi 40V outdoor lineup.
features: More power than a 40cc gas chainsaw
Up to 168 cuts per charge on 4x4 pine

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 18" Single-Stage Snow Blower (Tool Only)
description: A 40V HP brushless snow blower for clearing driveways and walkways. The 18-inch clearing width handles standard two-car driveways. Auger-propelled design pulls itself forward through heavy snow. No gas, no oil, no pull-cord -- just charge the battery and go.
features: HP Brushless motor for snow clearing power
LED headlights for early morning clearing

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 20" Chainsaw (Tool Only)
description: Ryobi's largest chainsaw at 20 inches handles large tree felling and heavy firewood processing. The 40V HP brushless motor provides enough power for trees up to 18 inches in diameter. For homeowners with wooded properties who need serious cutting capability without gas.
features: HP Brushless motor for heavy cutting

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 20" Push Mower (Tool Only)
description: The 40V HP brushless push mower delivers more power than a 150cc gas mower. The 20-inch deck handles most suburban lawns efficiently. Part of the 40V ecosystem with 85+ compatible tools and batteries. For homeowners who want gas-equivalent performance without gas.
features: HP Brushless motor -- more power than 150cc gas

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 20" Self-Propelled Mower (Tool Only)
description: A self-propelled version of the 40V HP 20-inch mower. The self-propel drive takes the effort out of mowing, especially on slopes and large yards. Adjust the speed to match your walking pace.
features: HP Brushless motor for gas-like performance

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 21" CrossCut Self-Propelled Mower Kit
description: Ryobi's top-of-the-line 21-inch mower uses a CrossCut dual-blade system for a cleaner cut and better mulching. It comes with two 6.0Ah batteries so you can mow up to 70 minutes on a charge -- enough for most 3/4-acre lots. It runs on the same 40V batteries as 85+ other Ryobi outdoor tools, making it a smart buy if you're already in that ecosystem.
features: CrossCut multi-blade system for superior cut quality and mulching
Smart Trek adaptive variable-speed self-propel matches your walking pace
Two 6.0Ah batteries included for extended runtime

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 21" Self-Propelled AWD Multi-Blade Mower Kit
description: The top-of-the-line 40V mower with all-wheel drive and multi-blade technology. AWD keeps traction on hills and slopes. Multi-blade design finely chops clippings for better mulching. This is Ryobi's answer to premium gas mowers.
features: All-wheel drive for hills and slopes

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 21" Self-Propelled Mower Kit
description: Ryobi's premium 21-inch self-propelled mower delivers more power than a 163cc gas mower. The 21-inch deck is standard residential size, and the self-propel makes mowing effortless. Includes two 40V batteries for extended runtime.
features: HP Brushless motor -- more power than 163cc gas

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 21" Single-Stage Snow Blower Kit
description: The premium 40V 21-inch snow blower handles heavier snowfall and wider paths. The larger clearing width means fewer passes on wide driveways. Includes two 40V batteries for extended clearing time during heavy storms.

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 26" Hedge Trimmer Kit (2.0Ah)
description: Ryobi's 26-inch hedge trimmer is the budget-friendly pick that still gets the job done. The extra-long 26-inch blade covers more hedge per pass than most competitors, and at $159 with a battery, it's about $100 less than the EGO. The 3/4-inch cutting capacity handles most residential hedges without issue. A great entry point if you're starting a 40V Ryobi collection.
features: Wrap-around front handle for comfortable cutting at any angle
3/4-inch cutting capacity for typical residential hedges

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 600 CFM Blower/Vacuum (Tool Only)
description: A combination blower and vacuum that blows leaves into piles then switches to vacuum mode to suck them up and mulch them. The built-in mulcher reduces leaf volume significantly for easier disposal. Eliminates the need for raking and bagging.
features: Blower AND vacuum in one tool

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 800 CFM Whisper Series Blower (Tool Only)
description: The 40V HP 800 CFM blower is Ryobi's most powerful handheld leaf blower. 800 CFM moves serious amounts of leaves and debris, rivaling many gas blowers. The Whisper Series design keeps noise manageable despite the power. Ideal for large yards with heavy leaf coverage.
features: HP Brushless motor for maximum performance

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless 850 CFM Whisper Series Backpack Blower Kit
description: The most powerful blower in Ryobi's lineup -- an 850 CFM backpack blower. The backpack design puts the weight on your back instead of your arm, allowing for extended use. Comparable to commercial gas backpack blowers but without the noise, fumes, or maintenance.

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless Edger (Tool Only)
description: A dedicated 40V edger for creating clean, defined edges along sidewalks, driveways, and garden beds. More powerful and precise than using a string trimmer as an edger. The 40V HP brushless motor cuts through established sod and thick grass edges.
features: HP Brushless motor for clean edging

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless Kinetic Log Splitter Kit
description: A battery-powered kinetic log splitter for processing firewood. Uses kinetic energy (a heavy flywheel) rather than hydraulics, delivering incredibly fast cycle times. Splits logs without the noise and fumes of a gas splitter. A unique and powerful tool for homeowners who heat with wood.
features: Kinetic energy splitting -- fast cycle times
HP Brushless motor drives the flywheel

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless Whisper Series 22" Two-Stage Snow Blower Kit
description: Ryobi's most powerful snow blower -- a two-stage design that handles deep, heavy, wet snow that single-stage models cannot manage. The two-stage auger and impeller system throws snow farther and clears down to the pavement. For regions with serious winter weather.
features: Two-stage auger and impeller for heavy snow
HP Brushless Whisper Series -- reduced noise

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless Whisper Series 26" Hedge Trimmer (Tool Only)
description: The premium 40V hedge trimmer with a 26-inch Whisper Series blade. The longest blade available, designed for professional-level hedge maintenance with reduced noise. Cuts thick branches easily with the HP brushless motor.
features: HP Brushless Whisper Series -- quiet operation

name: Ryobi 40V HP Brushless Whisper Series 600 CFM Handheld Blower Kit (4.0Ah)
description: Ryobi's Whisper Series blower delivers strong 600 CFM performance while being 85% quieter than a gas blower. At just $179 with a battery, it's one of the best values in cordless blowers. The 22-minute runtime on turbo is modest, but the variable speed trigger and cruise control help you stretch it for typical yard work. If you need more time, grab a second 40V battery.
features: Whisper Series: 85% quieter than gas blowers at 59 dB
600 CFM and 155 MPH with turbo button
Variable speed trigger with cruise control for sustained blowing
Lightweight at 6.6 lbs bare tool weight

name: Ryobi 40V Leaf Vacuum/Mulcher Kit
description: A dedicated leaf vacuum and mulcher for picking up leaves and grinding them into mulch. Walk behind it like a lawn mower and it vacuums up leaves from the yard. The mulching function reduces leaf volume by up to 10:1.

name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V 1/2 Gallon Electrostatic Sprayer Kit
description: An electrostatic sprayer that electrically charges liquid droplets so they wrap around surfaces for complete coverage. Originally popular for disinfection, also excellent for applying stain, sealers, and pesticides with less waste and more even coverage.

name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V 13" Push Mower (Tool Only)
description: A compact 13-inch cordless push mower for very small lawns, condo courtyards, and tight areas. Uses ONE+ 18V batteries you may already own. Not for large lawns, but perfect for small patches of grass where a full mower is overkill.

name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V 13" String Trimmer/Edger (Tool Only)
description: A 13-inch cordless string trimmer and edger for maintaining lawn edges, trimming around obstacles, and edging sidewalks. Converts from trimmer to edger with a twist of the shaft. No gas, no fumes, no pull-cord starting -- just battery power.

name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V 18" Hedge Trimmer (Tool Only)
description: An 18-inch cordless hedge trimmer for maintaining hedges, shrubs, and bushes. The dual-action blades cut on both sides for efficient trimming. Lighter and quieter than gas hedge trimmers, and the 18-inch blade handles most residential hedges.

name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V 250 CFM Blower (Tool Only)
description: An entry-level cordless leaf blower for small yards, driveways, and patios. The 250 CFM airflow handles leaves on hard surfaces and light debris. Quieter than gas blowers and requires zero maintenance. Great for apartment dwellers with small patios or balconies.
features: Zero maintenance -- no gas, oil, or spark plugs

name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V 350 CFM Blower (Tool Only)
description: A mid-range 350 CFM leaf blower for medium-sized yards. More power than the 250 CFM model for moving heavier debris and wet leaves. Still quiet enough for suburban neighborhoods where noise is a concern.
features: Turbo boost button for stubborn debris

name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V 6" Pruning Mini Chainsaw (Tool Only)
description: A 6-inch mini chainsaw for pruning small branches, trimming shrubs, and cutting small limbs. The compact size makes it easy to handle with one hand. Extremely popular for light yard maintenance without hauling out a full-size chainsaw.
features: 6-inch bar and chain for small branches

name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V Compact Cultivator (Tool Only)
description: A compact cordless cultivator for garden bed preparation, weeding, and soil aeration. The spinning tines break up compacted soil and mix in compost or fertilizer. Much easier than hand-tilling with a garden fork, especially for raised beds and flower gardens.
features: Cordless -- no cord to tangle in garden beds

name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V Handheld Sprayer (Tool Only)
description: A cordless handheld sprayer for herbicides, pesticides, fertilizer, and cleaning solutions. No more hand-pumping a manual sprayer. Just fill the bottle, attach a battery, and spray. Great for weed control, garden feeding, and small-area cleaning.

name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V Pruning Shear (Tool Only)
description: A powered pruning shear for cutting small branches and stems without hand fatigue. Replaces manual pruners for rose bushes, fruit trees, and garden maintenance. The powered action lets you make hundreds of cuts without your hand getting tired.

name: Ryobi ONE+ HP Brushless 10" Chainsaw Kit
description: A 10-inch cordless chainsaw for small tree felling, storm cleanup, and cutting firewood. The 18V battery can handle trees up to about 8 inches in diameter. Good for homeowners who need occasional chainsaw use without the maintenance of a gas chainsaw.
features: HP Brushless motor for sustained cutting
Tool-free chain tensioning and bar tightening

name: Ryobi ONE+ HP Brushless 15" String Trimmer (Tool Only)
description: The HP brushless 15-inch string trimmer delivers more power and a wider cut than the standard model. The brushless motor handles thicker weeds and grass without bogging down. The wider cutting swath means fewer passes along fence lines and yard edges.
features: HP Brushless motor for more cutting power

name: Ryobi ONE+ HP Brushless 16" Push Mower (Tool Only)

features: HP Brushless motor for better cutting power

name: Ryobi ONE+ HP Brushless 18" Single-Stage Snow Blower Kit

Uses ONE+ HP batteries for maximum runtime

name: Ryobi ONE+ HP Brushless 22" Hedge Trimmer (Tool Only)
description: The HP brushless 22-inch hedge trimmer covers more hedge per pass and cuts through thicker branches than the 18-inch model. The brushless motor delivers cleaner cuts and longer runtime. Worth the upgrade if you have extensive hedging to maintain.
features: HP Brushless motor for clean cutting

name: Ryobi ONE+ HP Brushless 24" Hedge Trimmer (Tool Only)
description: The longest blade hedge trimmer in the ONE+ 18V lineup at 24 inches. Covers the most hedge per pass, reducing trimming time on long hedgerows. The brushless motor maintains cutting speed throughout the battery charge.

name: Ryobi ONE+ HP Brushless 510 CFM Whisper Series Blower (Tool Only)
description: The most powerful 18V blower in the ONE+ lineup at 510 CFM. Still part of the Whisper Series for reduced noise. Handles larger yards and heavier leaf coverage. For homeowners who want to stay in the 18V ecosystem but need more blowing power.

name: Ryobi ONE+ HP Brushless 8" Pruning Chainsaw (Tool Only)
description: The HP brushless 8-inch pruning chainsaw handles thicker branches than the 6-inch model. The brushless motor provides more power for cutting through 4-6 inch limbs without bogging down. Still compact enough for easy handling while pruning trees.

name: Ryobi ONE+ HP Brushless Whisper Series 450 CFM Blower (Tool Only)
description: The Whisper Series 450 CFM blower delivers serious leaf-moving power while being dramatically quieter than standard blowers. The reduced noise is a game-changer in neighborhoods with noise restrictions. The brushless motor maximizes runtime for larger yards.
features: HP Brushless motor for power and runtime

name: Ryobi ONE+ HP Compact Brushless 220 CFM Blower (Tool Only)
description: The compact HP brushless blower emphasizes air speed (140 MPH) over volume. The focused high-speed air stream is better at dislodging stuck-on debris from sidewalk cracks and tight areas. The brushless motor runs longer per charge than standard models.
features: 220 CFM at 140 MPH -- high-velocity air stream

name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V 20 GPM Submersible Water Transfer Pump (Tool Only)

name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V 25' Drain Auger (Tool Only)

name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V 35' Drain Auger (Tool Only)
description: The extended 35-foot drain auger reaches deeper clogs in longer drain runs. Better for main line connections and floor drains that are further from the fixture. When the 25-foot model is not long enough, this one reaches the blockage.

name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V PEX Crimp Ring Press Tool (Tool Only)
description: A cordless PEX crimp ring press tool for plumbing installations and repairs. Creates secure PEX connections without hand fatigue from manual crimping. Essential for bathroom and kitchen plumbing projects using PEX tubing, which has largely replaced copper pipe in residential construction.

Multiple jaw sizes for common PEX sizes

name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V PEX Pinch Clamp Tool (Tool Only)
description: A cordless PEX pinch clamp tool for an alternative PEX connection method. Pinch clamps are easier for beginners than crimp rings and provide equally reliable connections. If you are doing your own plumbing, this tool makes PEX connections fast and foolproof.

name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V 10 oz. Caulk and Adhesive Gun (Tool Only)
description: A power caulk gun that squeezes caulk tubes and adhesive with consistent, even pressure. No more hand fatigue from squeezing a manual caulk gun on a long bathroom or window sealing job. Variable speed trigger gives you precise bead control.

name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V Heat Gun (Tool Only)

name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V 5" Variable Speed Dual Action Polisher (Tool Only)

name: Ryobi ONE+ 18V 3-1/4" Planer (Tool Only)
description: A cordless hand planer for trimming doors, smoothing rough lumber, and creating chamfers. When a door sticks after humidity swells the wood, a planer shaves it down to fit. Also useful for leveling uneven joints in woodworking projects.
